---
title: "Contents: _R examples Galleries_"
subtitle: "R code and resulting plots or results."
date: today
date-modified: today
listing:
  contents: galleries
  sort: "date-modified desc"
  type: table
  fields: [date-modified, date, title, image]
  field-display-names:
    date: "First published"
    date-modified: "Last edited"
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  feed: 
    title: "Using R for Photobiology: Galleries" 
    items: 8
    type: "partial"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

::: {.callout-note collapse=true}
# What are these galleries?

These pages contain collections of R code examples using a "cookbook-like" approach. Many of these examples make use of packages 'ggpp', 'ggpmisc', "gginnards' or from the R for photobiology suite. Frequently, they are used together with other R packages. This makes many of these examples unsuitable for inclusion in the packages' documentation.

A few of these pages demonstrate how to download data from specific on-line APIs and import them into an R session.

I update existing pages when packages change and add new ones from time to time.
:::
